data.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: Story map approval deferred — non-interactive session. 5 stories created: e11a-6d2e (Rule 5 in standard, walking skeleton), f691-f745 (impl-plan reference), 6e48-fced (TDD reviewer update), 5de2-b760 (agent verification + smoke test), 2d0b-28c1 (docs update).
